connections.gloss: country, field, ground, land, soil, [idiom] wild.
country, farm, piece of ground, land
connections.def: from 71; a field (as a drive for cattle); genitive case, the country; specially, a farm, i.e. hamlet:--country, farm, piece of ground, land. see GREEK for

connections.gloss: full (green) ears (of corn), fruitful field (place), plentiful (field).
field, flattering(-ry), ground, parcel, part, piece of land (ground), plat, portion, slippery place, smooth (thing).
field, land, parcel of ground, place, possession
connections.def: diminutive of 5561; a spot or plot of ground:--field, land, parcel of ground, place, possession. see GREEK for
